title: Teaching Assistant CV Example UK — Primary & Secondary

cv.name: Emily Clarke
cv.title: Teaching Assistant
cv.summary: Level 3 Teaching Assistant with 4 years supporting KS1 and KS2 pupils in mainstream and SEN settings. Skilled in phonics interventions, behaviour support, and safeguarding. Enhanced DBS on Update Service.

bullets: Supported class teacher with groups of 8 pupils — improved reading ages by 6 months on average
Delivered 1:1 phonics sessions for 12 children below expected standard
Completed Level 2 Safeguarding training and acted as first responder for welfare concerns
Supported pupil with EHCP in Year 3 — managed sensory breaks and communication aids
Prepared classroom resources and displays for weekly topic lessons

education.degree: Level 3 Diploma in Specialist Support for Teaching & Learning
education.raw:
Level 3 Diploma in Specialist Support for Teaching & Learning — 2021
Enhanced DBS · Paediatric First Aid
